About N'naFereh

Integrated Engineering
& Construction Solutions

N'naFereh Engineering & Construction Company SL Limited is a leading provider of integrated engineering and construction solutions, dedicated to delivering high-quality infrastructure and engineering projects across various sectors. Our firm specializes in innovative design, project management, and construction execution to meet the evolving needs of our clients.

Our Mission

To provide exceptional engineering and construction services through innovation, quality, and integrity, while fostering sustainable growth and contributing to the communities we serve.

Our Vision

To be the premier engineering and construction company known for transforming ideas into reality and setting benchmarks in quality and safety in the industry.

Management

Our leadership is founded on principles of innovation, expertise, and excellence — ensuring every project meets the highest standards of quality, efficiency, and sustainability.

Mohamed MarahFounder & CEO
Aiah WillieCo-Manager
Guiding Principles

What Drives Us

Six core principles that define our commitment to excellence in every project we undertake.

01

Integrity

Conducting all operations in an ethical, transparent, and honest manner in every client interaction and project.

02

Sustainability

Prioritizing environmental responsibility and promoting eco-friendly solutions in every project we design and build.

03

Innovation

Leveraging advanced methodologies and cutting-edge technology to achieve superior results for our clients.

04

Client-Centric

Building lasting partnerships through reliability, open communication, and consistently exceeding client expectations.

05

Safety First

Embedding safety as a core value to protect our workforce, clients, and communities across all project sites.

06

Quality Assurance

Delivering projects that exceed industry standards through meticulous attention to detail and continuous improvement.

What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive engineering, construction, and consulting solutions delivered with professionalism.

Engineering — 01

Engineering Services

Full-spectrum engineering across structural, civil, mechanical, electrical, and environmental disciplines — designed to the highest standards.

StructuralCivilM&EEnvironmental
Construction — 02

Construction Services

From general contracting to design-build and construction management. Our engineers have delivered projects even to the remotest places in Sierra Leone.

General ContractingDesign-BuildRenovation
Consulting — 03

Consulting Services

Expert project feasibility studies, risk management, quality assurance and control, and regulatory compliance assistance for any project scale.

FeasibilityRisk MgmtQA/QCCompliance
Procurement — 04

Procurement

Sourcing and delivering high-quality materials, equipment, and services. We maintain a global supplier network and use digital procurement platforms for efficiency.

SourcingSupply ChainEquipment
Real Estates — 05

Real Estates

Residential, commercial, and industrial property development, investment, and management. Our consultants advise on acquisition, sales, and leasing.

DevelopmentInvestmentManagement
Brokerage — 06

Investment Consultancy

Our brokerage division connects clients with tailored solutions — securing prime land, facilitating leasing agreements, and acquiring value-driven project sites with precision.

Land AcquisitionLeasingAdvisory
Safety

Strong Safety Record

N'naFereh maintains a strong safety record with a commitment to creating a culture of safety. Our rigorous training programs have resulted in significantly reduced accident rates and recognition for excellence.

Rigorous Training Programs

Comprehensive ongoing safety training for all site workers to ensure safe practices at every level.

Zero-Compromise Standards

Safety is embedded into every phase of project design, planning, and execution — non-negotiable.

Sustainability

Eco-Friendly Initiatives

We are committed to sustainable practices in all operations and projects — including eco-friendly materials, energy-efficient designs, and sustainable construction methods that minimize environmental impact.

Eco-Friendly Materials

Sustainable, low-impact materials sourced and used across all construction and infrastructure projects.

Energy-Efficient Design

Building designs engineered to minimize energy use and reduce the carbon footprint of every project.

Renewable Energy

Clean Energy Solutions
for Sierra Leone

As part of our commitment to sustainability, N'naFereh provides cutting-edge renewable energy solutions — from solar and wind energy projects to energy-efficient infrastructure. We design and implement systems that reduce carbon footprints while maximizing energy output.

Our expertise covers feasibility studies, engineering designs, project implementation, and maintenance — contributing to a cleaner, greener Sierra Leone while delivering clients energy independence and cost savings.

Authorized Distributor:JinKO Solar
Solar PV ModulesAll JinKO Solar brands available
BatteriesEnergy storage systems
InvertersSolar inverter systems & accessories

Our Divisions

More Than Construction

Beyond engineering and building, N'naFereh operates specialized divisions to serve clients across the full business lifecycle.

Investment Consultancy & Business Brokerage

Our brokerage division specializes in connecting clients with tailored solutions for their engineering and supplies needs. Acting as intermediaries, we ensure seamless transactions by combining deep market knowledge with client-oriented strategies. Whether securing prime land, facilitating leasing agreements, or acquiring value-driven project sites — we handle every aspect with professionalism and precision.

Real Estates Division

Our Real Estate division complements our engineering expertise by offering comprehensive services in property development, investment, and management. We deliver residential, commercial, and industrial projects built to the highest standards. Our consultants provide tailored advice to clients on property acquisition, sales, and leasing for lasting value.

Our Partners

Trusted Partnerships

Collaboration is at the heart of our business model. We build strong, meaningful partnerships to deliver exceptional outcomes for clients and communities.

JinKOSolar
Main Partner — Solar Supply

Authorized distributor of all JinKO Solar products in Sierra Leone — PV modules, batteries, inverters.

Government of Sierra Leone

Completed construction works for ministries and government agencies across all provinces.

🤝
International Organizations

Working with NGOs and international partners to deliver impactful infrastructure nationwide.
